Durabaculum cochliodes, or Durio zibethinus, is a tropical tree species known for its edible fruit. The health benefits of Durio zibethinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive well-being due to its rich content of antioxidants, fiber, and essential nutrients. The bioactive constituents of Durio zibethinus include tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Durio zibethinus include jams, preserves, and extracts, as well as traditional medicine formulations used to treat various health conditions.
